SELECT
    (SELECT AVG_consumption FROM (
        SELECT Segment, SUM(total_consumption) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS AVG_consumption
        FROM (
            SELECT cc.Segment, cc.CustomerID, cc.total_consumption
            FROM (
                SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
                FROM yearmonth ym
                JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
                WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
                  AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
                GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
            ) cc
            JOIN (
                SELECT Segment, MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
                FROM (
                    SELECT c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
                    FROM yearmonth ym
                    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
                    WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
                      AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
                    GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
                )
                GROUP BY Segment
            ) sm ON cc.Segment = sm.Segment AND cc.total_consumption = sm.min_consumption
        )
        GROUP BY Segment
        HAVING Segment = 'SME'
    )) -
    (SELECT AVG_consumption FROM (
        SELECT Segment, SUM(total_consumption) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS AVG_consumption
        FROM (
            SELECT cc.Segment, cc.CustomerID, cc.total_consumption

WITH seg_cons AS (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date,1,4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons_2012,
           SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date,1,4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons_2013
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR' AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
    GROUP BY c.Segment
),
perc AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           (cons_2013 - cons_2012) * 100.0 / NULLIF(cons_2013, 0) AS pct_increase
    FROM seg_cons
)
SELECT Segment, pct_increase
FROM perc
WHERE pct_increase = (SELECT MAX(pct_increase) FROM perc)
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment, pct_increase
FROM perc
WHERE pct_increase = (SELECT MIN(pct_increase) FROM perc);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT ((end_bal.balance - start_bal.balance) * 100.0 / start_bal.balance) AS increase_rate
FROM
    (SELECT balance
     FROM trans
     WHERE account_id = (
         SELECT loan.account_id
         FROM loan
         WHERE date = '1993-07-05'
         ORDER BY loan_id
         LIMIT 1
     )
       AND date = '1993-03-22'
     LIMIT 1) AS start_bal,
    (SELECT balance
     FROM trans
     WHERE account_id = (
         SELECT loan.account_id
         FROM loan
         WHERE date = '1993-07-05'
         ORDER BY loan_id
         LIMIT 1
     )
       AND date = '1998-12-27'
     LIMIT 1) AS end_bal;	----- bird -----	financial
